meta.title: DRDO Technology Foresight seed
meta.notes: Domains are aligned with the public Technology Foresight listing plus additional technology rows that match init_technologies.py (e.g. Fibre Optics, Naval Systems). Project titles and participating labs are representative—not extracted from detail PDFs on the website. Enrich org_unit_codes and descriptions from official documents.
